Support for Windows 10 Team edition on Surface Hub has ended. Learn more

Surface Hub 3: All-in-one digital Microsoft whiteboard for business

No matter where your meeting takes you, Surface Hub 3 brings the best of Microsoft Teams Rooms to any space.

Watch the full video
  1. Microsoft

Surface Hub 3

  • Hybrid meetings
  • Tech specs
  • Collaboration
  • Security
  • More
  • Surface Hub 3
    • Hybrid meetings

Surface Hub 3

Hybrid meetings
  • Hybrid meetings
  • Tech specs
  • Collaboration
  • Security
  • Where to buy

Breaking boundaries

The first all-in-one Teams Rooms board running on Windows. We’re bringing the best collaboration tools from Microsoft to Surface Hub 3.

1. Surface Hub Smart Camera

The AI-enabled camera’s aperture and ultra-wide field of view of 136 degrees, renders everything in focus, near and far.

2. Palm rejection

Technology can distinguish between intentional touch inputs and unintentional inputs, for a natural writing experience.

3. Mobile battery for 50-inch

Unplug and take your ideas anywhere using the APC™ Charge Mobile Battery.

4. Digital inking

A natural writing and drawing experience helps you maintain focus and allows for multi-user inputs with dual-pen active inking.

5. One-touch join

Walk up and start a Whiteboard session or join a meeting with one touch.

6. Flexible ecosystem

Stands, mounts and mobile carts from Steelcase and Salamander, plus peripherals certified for Microsoft Teams Rooms.

Explore your options

Download tech specs
...

Tech specs

Dimensions1

Surface Hub 3 50-inch

29.2-inch x 43.2-inch x 3.0-inch (741 mm x 1097 mm x 76 mm) 

Surface Hub 3 85-inch

44.5-inch x 77.1-inch x 3.4-inch (1130 mm x 1959 mm x 85.6 mm)

Graphics

Surface Hub 3 50-inch

Intel® i5 iGPU

Surface Hub 3 85-inch

Intel® i5 iGPU

Weight1

Surface Hub 3 50-inch

61.6 lbs (28 kg) 

Surface Hub 3 85-inch

185 lbs (84 kg)

Audio/video

Surface Hub 3 50-inch

  • 100Hz-12KHz range front-facing 3-way stereo speakers, including (6) front-facing mid-range, (3) front-facing tweeter and (1) rear bass drivers
  • 2x full band 8-element MEMS microphone arrays
  • Smart AV optimizes audio to Portrait or Landscape
  • Microsoft Surface Hub Smart Camera,2 4K, custom USB-C® connection, 136-degree HFOV

Surface Hub 3 85-inch

  • 100Hz-12KHz range 3-way stereo speakers, including (4) front-facing mid-range, (2) front-facing tweeter and (1) rear bass drivers
  • Full band 8-element MEMS microphone array
  • Microsoft Surface Hub Smart Camera,2 4K, custom USB-C® connection, 136-degree HFOV

Resolution

Surface Hub 3 50-inch

3840 x 2560 

Surface Hub 3 85-inch

3840 x 2160

Pen compatibility

Surface Hub 3 50-inch

  • Active, dual-pen inking support
  • Microsoft Surface Hub Pen3 (active)
  • Microsoft Surface Slim Pen, Microsoft Surface Slim Pen 2
  • Compatible with Microsoft Teams Rooms certified peripherals

Surface Hub 3 85-inch

  • Active, dual-pen inking support
  • Microsoft Surface Hub Pen3 (active)
  • Microsoft Surface Slim Pen, Microsoft Surface Slim Pen 2
  • Compatible with Microsoft Teams Rooms certified peripherals

Display 

Surface Hub 3 50-inch

  • PixelSense™ Display
  • 3:2 aspect ratio
  • 8-bit color
  • 15.5mm border
  • Anti-glare, IPS LCD
  • In-cell Touch with 10 simultaneous touch points and two pens

Surface Hub 3 85-inch

  • PixelSense™ Display
  • 16:9 aspect ratio
  • 8-bit color
  • 30.5mm border
  • Anti-glare, IPS LCD
  • In-cell Touch with 20 simultaneous touch points and two pens

Sensors

Surface Hub 3 50-inch

  • Doppler occupancy sensor 
  • Accelerometer 
  • Gyroscope 

Surface Hub 3 85-inch

  • (2) Doppler occupancy sensor

Compute4

Surface Hub 3 50-inch

  • Memory: 32 GB
  • Storage: 512 GB

Surface Hub 3 85-inch

  • Memory: 32 GB
  • Storage: 512 GB

Wireless

Surface Hub 3 50-inch

  • Wi-Fi 5: IEEE 802.11ac (a/b/g/n/ac compatible)
  • Bluetooth® Wireless 5.1 technology
  • Gigabit Ethernet
  • Microsoft Teams Cast5

Surface Hub 3 85-inch

  • Wi-Fi 5: IEEE 802.11ac (a/b/g/n/ac compatible)
  • Bluetooth® Wireless 5.1 technology
  • Gigabit Ethernet
  • Microsoft Teams Cast5

Software

Surface Hub 3 50-inch

  • Windows 11 IoT Enterprise with the Microsoft Teams Rooms on Windows experience
  • Configurable to Windows 11 Pro/ Enterprise6

Surface Hub 3 85-inch

  • Windows 11 IoT Enterprise with the Microsoft Teams Rooms on Windows experience
  • Configurable to Windows 11 Pro/ Enterprise6

Exterior

Surface Hub 3 50-inch

  • Casing: Precision machined aluminum with mineral-composite resin  
  • Color: Platinum 
  • Physical Buttons: Power, Volume, Source 

Surface Hub 3 85-inch

  • Casing: Precision machined aluminum with mineral-composite resin
  • Color: Platinum
  • Physical Buttons: Power, Volume, Source

Connections

Surface Hub 3 50-inch

  • (4) USB-C® including two camera ports (on display)
  • (1) USB-A™ (on display)
  • RJ45 Gigabit Ethernet
  • Mini-DisplayPort™ Video Output7
  • HDMI Video Input8
  • USB-C® with Alt-Mode DisplayPort Input8

Surface Hub 3 85-inch

  • (3) USB-C® (on display)
  • (1) USB-A™ (on display)
  • RJ45 Gigabit Ethernet
  • Mini-DisplayPort™ Video Output7
  • HDMI Video Input8
  • USB-C® with Alt-Mode DisplayPort Input8

Warranty9

Surface Hub 3 50-inch

1-year limited hardware warranty

Surface Hub 3 85-inch

1-year limited hardware warranty

What’s in the box 

Surface Hub 3 50-inch

  • (1) Surface Hub 3 50-inch
  • (1) Surface Hub Smart Camera2
  • (1) Surface Hub Pen3
  • 3m AC Power Cable
  • Quick Start Guide 

Surface Hub 3 85-inch

  • (1) Surface Hub 3 85-inch
  • (1) Surface Hub Smart Camera2
  • (2) Surface Hub Pen3
  • 4m AC Power Cable
  • Quick Start Guide

Expand workspaces, include everyone

Pause
Previous Next

Collaboration

Surface Hub 3 reimagines what a meeting space can be. Front Row on Surface Hub 3’s large, interactive display dissolves the boundaries between all attendees.

Dynamic interactions

Remote participants have the best possible view of the room. Surface Hub Smart Camera has an ultrawide field of view of 136 degrees, high-quality glass optics, and a great low light sensor.

Vibrant screen

The 4k display and the full band 8-element MEMS linear microphone array capture facial expressions, body language, and audio definition for a rich hybrid meeting experience.

Seamlessly share and co-create together

Invite teams to familiar workspaces by combining Microsoft Teams Rooms on Windows and Whiteboard in a premium Microsoft collaboration device.

  • Natural inking

    Natural writing and drawing experiences with the ease of use of how you interact with a pencil; erasing and editing are simple motions.

  • Co-create

    Designed to enable co-creation and collaboration in real time for everyone, regardless of location.

  • One-touch join

    One-touch-join to a Microsoft Teams, Zoom or Webex meeting from the home screen. Join meetings from partners or customers across platforms.

  • Teams experience

    Invite teams to a familiar workspace with Microsoft Teams Rooms on Windows and Whiteboard.

Make anyplace a teamwork place

From small group brainstorms to big team meetings, find the right fit with mobile flexibility and choice of size.

Slide %{start} of %{total}. %{slideTitle}
Skip A carousel panel showing three different views of working with Hub 3 from any place

Flexible

Meetings and conversations are dynamic; Surface Hub scales any meeting space or situation.

Adaptive

Surface Hub 3 can be converted to Windows 11 Pro or Enterprise for access to a wide range of apps, tools, and customization.

Versatile

Ideas are not linear or static. The 50-inch Surface Hub 3 can Smart Rotate into portrait, changing how you can interact.

End of A carousel panel showing three different views of working with Hub 3 from any place section

Security and manageability anywhere

The only collaboration board designed end-to-end by Microsoft, for the best Microsoft experience.

Security from chip to cloud

Surface Hub 3 offers layers of protection, from chip-to-cloud, for secure mobile experiences and is easy to manage in-person or remotely. Security happens in the background, so it doesn’t disrupt what you’re working on.
Learn more about Surface and security

Centrally manage

Take advantage of a consistent management experience through Teams Admin Center and the new Pro Portal, allowing all devices in your organization to be managed together seamlessly.
Learn more about Surface and manageability

Modular

Get the power of Surface Hub 3 and upgrade seamlessly to the Teams Room experience with the Surface Hub 3 Compute Cartridge,10 thanks to the modular design of Surface Hub.
See Hub accessories

  • Designed for the modern workplace

    The Surface for Business portfolio delivers experiences employees love with the choice and flexibility they need to work on their terms.

    Where to buy Compare devices
  • New

    Surface Pro for Business, 13-inch | Intel

    Starting at $1,949.49

    Fast, workday-ready performance powered by the next-gen Intel® Core™ Ultra processor (Series 3), with built-in AI and optional 5G for productivity anywhere.

    • Intel® Core™ Ultra processor (Series 3)
    • AI experiences powered by a dedicated NPU
    • 13-inch PixelSense™ Flow touchscreen with optional OLED
    • Optional 5G connectivity
    • All-day battery life
    Meet Surface Pro
  • New

    Surface Laptop for Business, 13.8 and 15-inch | Intel

    Starting at $1,949.99

    Reliable Intel® Core™ Ultra processor (Series 3) performance with on-device AI, plus an integrated privacy screen on select models for added security.

    • Intel® Core™ Ultra processor (Series 3)
    • AI experiences powered by a dedicated NPU
    • 13.8-inch or 15-inch PixelSense™ Flow touchscreen
    • Integrated privacy screen on select models
    • All-day battery life
    Meet Surface Laptop
  • New

    Surface Laptop for Business, 13-inch | Intel

    Starting at $1,499.99

    Powerful AI productivity in a lightweight laptop with the latest Intel® Core™ Ultra processor (Series 3) performance.

    • Intel® Core™ Ultra processor (Series 3)
    • AI experiences powered by a dedicated NPU
    • 13-inch PixelSense™ touchscreen
    • All-day battery life
    Meet Surface Laptop

  • Surface Pro, 12-inch | Snapdragon

    Starting at $1,199.99

    The ultra-portable, powerful, and flexible 2-in-1 PC designed for lightning-fast performance and enhanced AI experiences.

    • Snapdragon® X Plus processor
    • Exceptional battery life
    • 12-inch PixelSense™ Flow touchscreen
    Meet Surface Pro

  • Surface Laptop, 13-inch | Snapdragon

    Starting at $1,299.99

    Powerful, intelligent, and ultra-portable laptop designed for enhanced AI experiences and fast performance.

    • Snapdragon® X Plus processor
    • Exceptional battery life
    • 13-inch PixelSense™ touchscreen
    Meet Surface Laptop

  • Surface Pro, 13-inch (11th Ed.) | Intel

    Starting at $1,699.99

    The versatile 2-in-1 PC designed to boost productivity with exceptional performance and powerful AI capabilities.

    • Intel® Core™ Ultra processor (Series 2)
    • AI-enhanced communication
    • 13-inch PixelSense™ Flow touchscreen
    • Long battery life
    Meet Surface Pro

  • Surface Laptop, 13.8 and 15-inch (7th Ed.) | Intel

    Starting at $1,699.99

    Built for business, with powerful AI capabilities, exceptional performance and long battery life.

    • Intel® Core™ Ultra processor (Series 2)
    • Powerful NPU to drive PC experiences
    • 13.8-inch or 15-inch PixelSense™ Flow touchscreen
    • Optional 5G connectivity on 13.8-inch
    Meet Surface Laptop

  • Surface Pro, 13-inch | Snapdragon

    Starting at $1,449.99

    The flexible 2-in-1 PC designed for enhanced AI experiences, with industry leading AI acceleration to unlock powerful new features.

    • Snapdragon® X Elite and Plus processors
    • Exceptional battery life
    • 13-inch PixelSense™ Flow touchscreen
    • Optional 5G connectivity
    Meet Surface Pro

  • Surface Laptop, 13.8 and 15-inch | Snapdragon

    Starting at $1,449.99

    Ultra-thin laptop designed for enhanced AI experiences, with industry leading AI acceleration to unlock powerful new features.

    • Snapdragon® X Elite and Plus processors
    • Exceptional battery life
    • 13.8-inch or 15-inch PixelSense™ Flow touchscreen
    Meet Surface Laptop

  • Surface Studio 2+

    Starting at $4,499.99

    Find fuel for inspiration on a sleek, versatile all-in-one device that commands attention.

    • 28-inch touchscreen display
    • 11th Gen Intel® Core™ H-35 Processor
    • NVIDIA® GeForce RTX 3060 dGPU
    Meet Surface Studio 2+

  • Surface Hub 3

    An all-in-one digital whiteboard, meetings platform, and collaborative computing device.

    • 50-inch display for smaller spaces
    • 85-inch display for larger rooms

  • [1] Size and weight vary by configuration and manufacturing process.
  • [2] Formerly known as the Surface Hub 2 Smart Camera.
  • [3] Formerly known as the Surface Hub 2 Pen.
  • [4] System software uses significant storage space. Available storage is subject to change based on system software updates and apps usage. 1 GB = 1 billion bytes. 1 TB = 1,000 GB. See Surface.com/Storage for more details.
  • [5] For additional information on casting content to Microsoft Teams Rooms, visit Microsoft Support.
  • [6] Software license and image required. Sold separately. For additional information, visit Microsoft Learn.
  • [7] Available when running Windows 10/11 Pro/Enterprise.
  • [8] Available in bypass only. Visit Surface Hub | Microsoft Learn for additional information on connecting devices to Surface Hub.
  • [9] Microsoft’s Limited Warranty is in addition to your consumer law rights.
  • [10] Formerly Surface Hub 3 Pack.
